project_type: React + Vite SPA with Tailwind CSS - mind map/project management tool
test_command: npm run build (no test suite - verify via build success)
verification_instructions: Run `npm run build` to confirm no compilation errors. The project has no automated tests.
setup_instructions: cd /projects/sandbox/mind-map && npm install && npm run build
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full access to npm registry and external resources
contribution_requirements: Commit to feat/task-management-system branch. PR #14 already exists.
key_patterns: Single-file monolithic App.jsx (~5873 lines) with state management via useState/useCallback. Components: TaskPanel.jsx (sidebar), PinPanel.jsx, ReminderPanel.jsx, MiniMap.jsx. Tailwind CSS for styling. lucide-react for icons. Data persisted to localStorage via projects array. Export/import includes tasks and taskGroups fields.
relevant_files: src/App.jsx - main app with task state (lines 429-434), addTask (3066), updateTask (3081), deleteTask (3085), reorderTask (3099), getTaskSection (3058), addTaskGroup (3134), renameTaskGroup, deleteTaskGroup, exportData (2070), handleImport (2141), TaskPanel rendering (5543-5564)
src/TaskPanel.jsx - current sidebar task panel component (816 lines), will be redesigned into FullTaskManager.jsx
src/index.css - global styles and scrollbar customization
directory_structure: src/ contains App.jsx (monolith), TaskPanel.jsx, MiniMap.jsx, PinPanel.jsx, ReminderPanel.jsx, main.jsx, index.css. No subdirectories.
